titleText: JTF News: BBC News, Deutsche Welle
mainText: The United States imposed sanctions on the Rwandan military over fighting in eastern Congo.
Israel conducted strikes on Beirut and Tehran.

titleText: JTF News: PBS NewsHour, Deutsche Welle
mainText: President Emmanuel Macron of France stated France will increase its nuclear arsenal and allow temporary deployment of nuclear-armed jets to European allies.

titleText: JTF News: ABC News Australia, BBC News
mainText: Oil prices rise following attacks on ships near the Strait of Hormuz.

titleText: JTF News: PBS NewsHour, BBC News
mainText: 169 people killed in a village in a remote area of South Sudan after an insurgent raid.
